The '''''Sabre''''' was a [[Gamma-class ATR-6 assault transport|''Gamma''-class ATR-6 assault transport]] used by the [[Ripoblus (people)|Ripoblus]] to attack the [[Dimok (people)|Dimok]] [[Science Station Youst]]. It was destroyed at the [[Battle of Science Station Youst]] by imperial pilot [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]], who fired two heavy rockets to the transport.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']]
